en: Timi theo ra ma ilo Haso ma jana lako jari Ma bhitra boseko tiro
Dada bhitra ko andhakar Timi leo ujalo Zindagi
ma kehi bhartha rakhi Taro bhitra ko andhakar ma Ma alji rahi sabhi kehi kumai
Timi ra ma bhitra ma kamanchi Farak farak sapadharu Timi
khushi ko pratik Ma peda ko swat
Timi le dekhe ujalo Ma khuste antyaaro
Hame beech ko antar Yasto lagcha abhoro
Timi ra ma Farak sansara ka prani
Timi khushi Ma bhitra pira Tara ajay paani Maya
Timi ra ma Yoko takwili pura nahone
